transactions: June 6, 1983:Drafted by theAtlanta Bravesin the23rd roundof the 1983 amateur draft, but did not sign.
January 17, 1984:Drafted by theBaltimore Oriolesin the2nd roundof the 1984 amateur draft (January Secondary), but did not sign.
June 3, 1985:Drafted by theMontreal Exposin the1st round(10th pick) of the 1985 amateur draft (June Secondary).
June 9, 1986:Purchased by theMilwaukee Brewersfrom theMontreal Expos.
